title: The People Push Back — Part 2
description: Dressrosa’s citizens and allies resist the Birdcage together as the final countdown begins.
scene: On pages 9–13, Rebecca, Kyros, Viola, Dressrosa Citizens, Luffy move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The seeds of the DANDE- Healions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are able to bring miraculous "Super Healing" to people within a wide area!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Because Princess Manshelly, saddened by the wounds her beloved dressrosa has suffered, is crying contrai-NUously,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I believe we will be able to save a great number of lives!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yet this power has one major drawback:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The super healing is limited to but a few minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So, then, those warriors that couldn't move before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm afraid that's the case! Once the time limit has expired, they'll be back to the way they originally were!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: This is but a life- support measure designed to help us make it through our current situation!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The pain's suddenly dis-appeared!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Look at him go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's a miracle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: God, recognizing the plight this country is in,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Has brought us a miracle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Give it your best,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Dress- Rosa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: CUB- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Yes, Princess Manshelly ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: This is how I fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I cannot use weapons,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Nor can I beat up the bad guys, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: My tears ...my tears will not stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Yes, Princess. This gracious fighting style suits you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I'm not sure why, but the wounded have suddenly recovered!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Oi! You lot, listen to my voice!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: What's the matter, hundreds Dan Hack!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: No, the guy behind him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: GYAH! God usopp! The five-star convict!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Exactly how bad of a criminal record do you have!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Those of you that have strength, get to the eastern and western edges of the city!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: to where those guys are pushing the bird cage?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: There's no way that thing's gonna...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Silence Heathens!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Believe in my friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Do not anger the God any further!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: If bird Cage really is unavoidable, then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Their efforts their actions... everything will have been in vain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: I won't let it all end that way, Dofla- Mingo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: father ...when the time comes, I too must...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Viola- San!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Rebecca! Why are you here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Don't you dare get any funny ideas!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: If I let you get yourself killed here, I couldn't...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Possibly face brother kyros or my sister...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Well, Viola... Pray tell, what have you come here to do, then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: I hear tell that the Donqui- XOTE family is all but finished...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Yet I, who used to be an executive, don't get a chance to get what's been coming to me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: That's a little too convenient, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: No!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: One of us dies today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Doffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: You always were a passionate one... Violet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Central District

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: We finally made it here! Let us in, please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Bird Cage is closing in on US!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: It seems its really dangerous further on inside so we've not been able to get much farther ourselves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: Everyone from around the country's gathered in this part of the city!

summary: This part focuses on the people push back, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
